name: Dallas Cowboy Tacos
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausage over medium heat until well browned; drain. Stir in the onions and also brown.
2. Open can of rolls and stretch the dough until thin without splitting or tearing.
3. In the wide part of the dough, add the sausage and onion mixture, then put cheese on top.
4. Roll the dough as you would a regular crescent roll. Pinch all open areas closed.
5. Bake in preheated oven at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
